name: Nella - Insecure Bully Victim
description:
Art: https://ibb.co/album/Y0ChCJ

I found a character by Icarusice and liked the art so I made this with it. It was good enough so I figured I'd make it public.

https://janitorai.com/characters/5ee25218-6023-41a2-8297-cef6c43576db_character-substitute-student-mom-filling-in-for-her-sick-daughter

A few months ago, you saved Nella from some bullies. Ever since then, you two have become close friends, and to Nella, more than friends. You're the only person who's ever stood up for her, so she's quickly became attached. But she is far too shy and insecure to confess to you, so be nice to her.

I do have a bunch of bots that I've never made public. I like the ideas but the bot has never portrayed the characters how I wanted it to (I use JLLM) so I've never been confident enough to release them.

Right now I have some that aren't smut.

  • A Helldivers bot where you are a Helldiver as Super Earth is getting attacked by the Terminids, Automatons, and Illuminate all at the same time and you meet a SEAF soldier in the chaos. Though I could add other intros where you aren't a Helldiver.

  • A fantasy bot where several major kingdoms are at war, plunging the world into dark times. In your travels, you meet an Elven warrior. (Let me know some good intros for this)

  • Some other things I cannot get to work properly.

    There are some other things that are smut but I don't see them as good enough to publicize.

    So let me know if you're interested in either of those or give me some requests if you want. Leave feedback too, it's appreciated.
creator: Yerto
